title: Melintasi Sepi di Bawah Lampu Jalan
theme: Seorang individu yang berjuang mengatasi paranoia dan kecemasan yang muncul saat sendirian di tengah malam, mempertanyakan realitas dan pikiran sendiri serta mencari kedamaian dalam rutinitas.

cover.prompt: A late evening urban landscape in Jakarta, viewed from the entrance of a modern corporate building. A lone, indistinct figure in silhouette steps onto a wide pathway, entering the humid city air. Distant, atmospheric city lights cast a gentle glow across tall structures and the softly reflective ground. The scene conveys a quiet, lingering city energy with a sense of transition.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young office worker's routine late-night walk home turns into a harrowing psychological journey as she battles escalating paranoia and anxiety, questioning her perceptions and sanity amidst the city's eerie silence, culminating in a moment of terror over a mundane sound before finding temporary relief.
